_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY WISP - https://wisp.gg/
name: s&box Game Server
author: dev@yorkhost.fr
description: s&box dedicated server (YorkHost) — Wine + baked Windows .NET + SteamCMD prefetch.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# s&box install script — YorkHost egg
#
# Runs once in the panel's install container (Pterodactyl/Pelican) against
# /mnt/server (which becomes /home/container at runtime). Goals:
#   1. Bootstrap SteamCMD inside the server volume.
#   2. Prefetch the s&box Windows server depot (app 1892930) so the first
#      container boot does not depend on a SteamCMD round-trip to Valve.
#   3. Create the directory skeleton the entrypoint expects.
#
# Failure of the prefetch is non-fatal — the runtime entrypoint will retry
# (SBOX_AUTO_UPDATE=1 by default), so the worst case is the original upstream
# behaviour (first boot pays the SteamCMD cost).
set -e

APP_ID="${SBOX_APP_ID:-1892930}"
BRANCH="${SBOX_BRANCH:-}"
PLATFORM="windows"

export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
dpkg --add-architecture i386
apt-get update -qq
apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    tar \
    lib32gcc-s1 \
    >/dev/null

cd /mnt/server
mkdir -p sbox projects logs steamcmd .wine

if [ ! -f steamcmd/steamcmd.sh ]; then
    echo "[install] downloading SteamCMD..."
    curl -fsSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz \
        | tar -xz -C steamcmd
    chmod +x steamcmd/steamcmd.sh
fi

echo "[install] prefetching s&box server (app ${APP_ID}, platform ${PLATFORM}${BRANCH:+, branch ${BRANCH}})..."

STEAM_ARGS=(
    +@ShutdownOnFailedCommand 1
    +@NoPromptForPassword 1
    +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType "${PLATFORM}"
    +force_install_dir /mnt/server/sbox
    +login anonymous
    +app_update "${APP_ID}"
)

if [ -n "${BRANCH}" ]; then
    STEAM_ARGS+=( -beta "${BRANCH}" )
fi

STEAM_ARGS+=( validate +quit )

prefetch_ok=0
if ./steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "${STEAM_ARGS[@]}"; then
    prefetch_ok=1
else
    # A failed/interrupted app_update poisons appmanifest_<appid>.acf, after which
    # SteamCMD aborts instantly ("state is 0x402") on every later run. Clear it
    # and retry once so the prefetch can actually seed sbox-server.exe.
    MANIFEST="/mnt/server/sbox/steamapps/appmanifest_${APP_ID}.acf"
    if [ -f "${MANIFEST}" ]; then
        echo "[install] clearing stale Steam app manifest ${MANIFEST} and retrying prefetch once"
        rm -f "${MANIFEST}"
    else
        echo "[install] prefetch failed; retrying once"
    fi
    if ./steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "${STEAM_ARGS[@]}"; then
        prefetch_ok=1
    fi
fi

if [ "${prefetch_ok}" -ne 1 ]; then
    echo "[install] SteamCMD prefetch failed; runtime updater will retry on first boot"
fi

if [ -f sbox/sbox-server.exe ]; then
    echo "[install] prefetch ok: sbox/sbox-server.exe is present"
else
    echo "[install] warn: sbox-server.exe missing — first boot will rely on the runtime updater"
fi

echo "[install] done."

variables.name: Game
variables.description: Primary game package passed to +game (for example: facepunch.walker, mydriss.darkrp).

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: Public server name shown in the s&box server browser and listings.

variables.name: Map
variables.description: Optional map/package identifier loaded after +game. Leave blank to use the game default (for example: facepunch.flatgrass).

variables.name: Local Project (.sbproj)
variables.description: Optional local .sbproj target for +game. File must exist under /home/container/projects/; enter only relative folder/file (for example: richman/richman.sbproj).

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players allowed on the server. (This depends on gamemode support, setting this may cause issues)

variables.name: Query Port
variables.description: Server query port for Direct Connect. (Experimental)

variables.name: Direct Connect (No Steam Relay)
variables.description: Allow direct connection via IP+Port without Steam relay (0=Steam relay enabled, 1=Direct IP connection enabled). When enabled, players can connect directly to the server IP and port instead of using Steam relay.

variables.name: Game Server Token
variables.description: Optional Steam game server token passed as +net_game_server_token.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Run a SteamCMD update check on every container boot to keep the server up to date (1=enabled, 0=disabled).

variables.name: Branch
variables.description: Optional Steam beta branch name used for updates (for example: staging).

variables.name: Extra Args
variables.description: Optional extra launch arguments appended to sbox-server.exe, some gamemodes may require additional arguments to function properly. Use with caution.

variables.name: SteamCMD Timeout (seconds)
variables.description: Maximum time to wait for each SteamCMD probe/update call before continuing startup (0 disables timeout).

variables.name: Windows .NET Version
variables.description: Informational only: Windows .NET runtime version baked into the container image.

variables.name: Server Description
variables.description: Optional public server description, passed as +server_description. Some gamemodes use it as the listing tagline.

variables.name: Tickrate
variables.description: Optional server simulation frequency, passed as +tickrate. Higher values improve physics but increase CPU usage. Leave blank to use the gamemode default.

variables.name: Owner SteamID
variables.description: Optional Steam64 ID granted superadmin rights on supported gamemodes (e.g. DarkRP.xyz). Passed as +owner_steamid.

variables.name: Cloud Server ID
variables.description: Optional cloud-sync server identifier (for gamemodes such as DarkRP.xyz — get it from https://darkrp.xyz/dashboard). Passed as +server_id.

variables.name: Cloud Server Key
variables.description: Optional cloud-sync server secret (for gamemodes such as DarkRP.xyz — get it from https://darkrp.xyz/dashboard). Passed as +server_key. Redacted from container logs.
